steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The author contrasts “not a rough wind” with the wind that “came in delightful little gusts and brought a fresh scent.” This structure shows “rough” describes something unpleasant—the opposite of the actual delightful conditions being portrayed.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content: ”Harsh” directly describes an unpleasant, forceful wind—the meaning “rough” conveys in this context. The other choices don't apply to wind conditions. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
